verses.text: Tu-in gulpi pen, Topa Pasian' bawlsa gamlak ganhing dangte khempeuh sangin ngiansiam zaw hi. Amah in numei kiangah, “Pasian in, ‘Huan sung singgah khat peuhpeuh ne lo ding,’ hong ci ahi hiam?” ci hi
Numei in gulpi kiangah, “Huan sung singgahte ka ne thei ding uh hi
Ahih hangin Pasian in, ‘Huan laizanga om singgah na ne kei ding uh hi, zong na lawng kei ding uh hi. Tua bang hih le-uhcin na si ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin gulpi in numei kiangah, “Na si kei ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh tua singgah na nek ciangun na mitte uh hong vak ding a, a pha leh a sia thei-in, Pasian tawh na kibat ding lamtak uh Pasian in thei hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin singkung a hoihna, mi a pilsak dingin tua a gah a deihhuaina a muh ciangin, a singgah lo-in a ne hi. Amah in singgah kimkhat a pasal pia a, a pasal in zong a ne hi
A nek khit phetun amaute gel in khua phawk uh a, a guaktangin a omlam uh kithei uh hi. Amaute in theitehte khui tuahin puansilh dingin a bawl uh hi
A nitak ciangin huan sungah Topa Pasian a hong paina ging amaute in za uh a, Topa Pasian' muh loh dingin mipa leh a zi, huan sung singte lakah a bu uh hi
Ahih hangin Topa Pasian in mipa samin ama kiangah, “Koi lai-ah om na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Amah in, “Nangma gin'na huan sungah ka za a, ka lau hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka guaktangin om ka hih manin ka bucip hi,” a ci hi
Amah in, “Na guaktanga na omna kua in hong gen ahi hiam? Na nek loh dinga kong thupiak singgah ne kha na hi hiam?” ci hi
Mipa in, “Kei tawh a om dinga nong piak numei in singgah hong pia a, ke'n ka ne hi,” ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in numei kiangah, “Bangcia hici gamtat na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Numei in, “Gulpi in kei hong khem a, ka ne hi,” ci hi

Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in gulpi kiangah, “Nang, hih bangin gamta khin na hih manin, ganhing khempeuhte leh gamlak ganhing khempeuhte sangin ciamsiatna na ngahzaw hi. Na gilpi-in lam na pai ding a, na nuntak sung tawntungin leivui na ne ding hi
Nang leh numei kikal na suanlekhakte leh ama suanlekhakte kikalah kilangneihna ka omsak ding hi. Amah in na lutang hong sunim ding a, nang in ama khetul na sunim ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin numei kiangah, “Naupaina-ah na gimna nakpi takin ka khangsak ding a, na a sapipi-in nau na nei ding hi. Ahi zongin na pasal mah na deih ding a, amah in nang tungah hong uk ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin mipa kiangah, “Nang in na zi' thu mangin, ‘Nang in na ne kei ding hi,’ ci-in nang kong thupiak singgah ne na hih ciangin, nangma hangin leitang in samsiatna ngah hi. Na nuntak tawntung gimpi-in na semin na annek ding na zong ding hi
Ling leh kiakte, nang-a' dingin hong pokhiasak ding a, nang in gamlak kungte na ne ding hi

Lei-ah na ciahkik matengin khua-ul kai-in na na sep ciang bekin an na ne ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh lei sung panin nang hong kipiangsak a, nang, leivui na hih manin, leivui mah na suakkik ding hi,” a ci hi
Mipa in a zi' min pen Eve, ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen mihing khempeuh' nu ahi hi
Topa Pasian in mipa leh a zi-a' dingin savun puan bawl a, amaute silhsak hi
Tua ciangin Topa Pasian in, “En un, mipa pen eite khat tawh kibang a, a pha leh a sia thei hi. Amah in nuntakna singgah ne-in a hin' tawntung khak lohna dingin i vaihawm ding hi,” ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian in, amah a kipiansakna leitang a kho dingin Eden Huan panin mipa a sawlkhia hi
Amah in mipa hawlkhia hi. Kherub-te leh mun khempeuh a nga thei meikuang namsau pen Eden Huan nisuahna lamah nuntakna singkung lampi a cing dingin a koih hi.
